POLICY.NAME: Devolution
POLICY.DESC: Government power is substantially delegated to local authorities.

POLICY.NAME: Native Representation
POLICY.DESC: Only native-born citizens may hold elected office.

POLICY.NAME: Marriage Equality
POLICY.DESC: Citizens of the same sex may marry.

POLICY.NAME: Gun Control
POLICY.DESC: Citizens are forbidden from owning firearms.

POLICY.NAME: Capitalism
POLICY.DESC: Private industry is permitted within a market-based economy.

POLICY.NAME: Climate Treaty
POLICY.DESC: The nation is a signatory to an international climate treaty.
